channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Exploring Microgrids as a Solution for Diesel-Dependent Remote Communities
item.description: Remote Australian communities face unique challenges when it comes to energy supply, as many rely heavily on diesel for electricity. About 500,000 Australians live off-grid, and in regions like the No...

item.title: Lapu Lapu survivor criticizes ICBC and donation handling after tragic festival incident
item.description: Blaine Redlac, 29, a survivor of the tragic Lapu Lapu Festival crash in Vancouver, is voicing frustration with British Columbia’s insurance and support systems almost a year after the incident. Redlac...

item.title: U.S. and Israeli Missile Interceptor Stocks Deplete Amid Ongoing Conflict with Iran
item.description: Israel has informed the United States that it is running low on ballistic missile interceptors as the war with Iran continues. The famed Iron Dome defense system, highly praised in the past, has faced...

item.title: RBA faces tough March interest rate decision amid inflation and global uncertainty
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) is grappling with one of its most complex interest rate decisions in years, influenced by rising inflation and global instability due to the war in the Middle East....

item.title: UDSM Opens New AI Centre to Boost Technology Education in Tanzania
item.description: The Parliamentary Standing Committee on Education, Culture and Sports recently visited the new Artificial Intelligence (AI) building at the College of Information and Communication Technologies (CoICT...

item.title: Third Impeachment Complainants Decline to Respond to VP Duterte’s Statement
item.description: The third set of impeachment complainants against Vice President Sara Duterte has decided to waive their right to reply following what they described as a 'non-answer' from the vice president regardin...

item.title: Trump Comments on Speculation Regarding Ayatollah Khamenei's Health
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has made a rather startling comment regarding the health of Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, the second-in-line to Iran's Supreme Leader. In a recent remark, Trump reported...

item.title: Measures Needed to Mitigate Flooding in Kenya
item.description: Kenya has been hit hard by heavy rains causing severe flooding across many counties. These floods have led to loss of lives, destroyed homes, roads and bridges, and displaced thousands of people. The ...

item.title: Vice-President Nchimbi and leaders join 5th anniversary commemoration of late President Magufuli in Chato
item.description: Vice-President Dr Emmanuel Nchimbi has been appointed as the guest of honour at the five-year commemoration of the late President Dr John Magufuli’s death. The main event is taking place in Chato Dist...

item.title: Major Safety Lapses Found in Shalimar Express Coaches After Naushahro Feroze Accident
item.description: Lahore – Pakistan Railways has revealed serious safety issues following the Naushahro Feroze train accident involving the 27-Up Shalimar Express. Initial inspection reports showed that 10 out of the 1...

item.title: Volvo Launches ES90 Electric Sedan with 755km Range and Fast Charging in SA
item.description: Volvo Cars South Africa has introduced the new ES90, a luxury electric sedan offering a claimed range of 755km on a single charge. Available in three trims ranging from R1.59m to R1.795m, the rear-whe...

item.title: Families Protest at Abuja Works Ministry Over Five Engineers Missing Since 2021
item.description: Dem families and human rights activists don storm the office of the Minister of Works, David Umahi, for Mabushi, Abuja to demand answers for five engineers wey disappear for Ebonyi State since 2021. T...

item.title: Bong Go urges traders and suppliers not to hoard or overprice amid rising fuel and food costs
item.description: Sen. Bong Go has appealed to traders and suppliers not to take advantage of soaring fuel prices by hoarding goods or overpricing basic food items, saying Filipinos are already struggling with the high...

item.title: Scottish Parliament faces tight vote on assisted dying bill for terminally ill adults
item.description: The Scottish Parliament is set to hold a final vote on Tuesday on the Assisted Dying for Terminally Ill Adults (Scotland) Bill, introduced by Liberal Democrat MSP Liam McArthur. If passed, Scotland wo...

item.title: Tanzania’s Commission of Inquiry: Experts Leading National Investigation
item.description: This article talks about how Tanzania, like many other countries, uses commissions of inquiry to examine important national issues. These commissions are legal mechanisms that allow careful investigat...

item.title: Israel Conducts Airstrikes on Iranian and Hezbollah Targets in Tehran and Beirut
item.description: The Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) announced a new wave of airstrikes targeting infrastructure linked to the Iranian regime in Tehran and Hezbollah positions in Beirut. This marks the tenth such operati...

item.title: NDP could regain momentum if it unites behind a strong leader
item.description: Following recent divisions within the Liberal party over arms export legislation, there is an opening for the New Democratic Party (NDP) to strengthen its political position. Notably, Liberal MP Lori ...

item.title: South Africa examines Israel ICJ case amid West Bank family tragedy
item.description: Two young boys survived a shooting in Tammoun, northern West Bank, which killed four members of the Bani Odeh family, including their parents and two siblings. The family had been returning from Nablu...

item.title: Victorian Government criticised over cancellation and cost blowouts of 2026 Commonwealth Games
item.description: The 2026 Commonwealth Games, initially planned to be a major sporting event across regional Victoria, were cancelled in July 2023, leaving a $600 million cost to state taxpayers and sparking widesprea...

item.title: H&M Studio S/S 2026 Collection Showcases Bold and Eccentric Designs
item.description: The H&M Studio Spring/Summer 2026 collection is a clear departure from the understated tones of past fashion trends, favouring eccentricity and individuality. Cape Town hosted an exclusive preview at ...
